# @uni-design-system/uni-angular — API reference

> Generated from source by scripts/generate-api.mjs (pnpm docs:api). Do not edit by hand.

Themed Angular component library. Signals-only API: every input below is a
signal input — read as `component.name()`, bind as `[name]="..."`. Two-way
model inputs support `[(name)]`. Form controls implement Signal Forms
`FormValueControl`/`FormCheckboxControl` and bind with `[field]`.

Import everything from `@uni-design-system/uni-angular`.
Canonical selectors are the `uni-`-prefixed form; the short/PascalCase
aliases (e.g. `Checkbox`, `button[text-button]`) are supported secondaries.

Inheritance (inputs listed once, available on all subclasses):
- Components extending `BaseComponent` also accept `variant: Variant` and `size: Size`.
- Layout components (`UniBoxComponent` and subclasses Row, Stack, Center, Wrap, Grid,
  MenuItem) also accept every `UniBoxComponent` input (padding*, border*, color,
  display, gap, width/height, flex/grid props, ...).

## BodyRenderDirective
- selector: `[uniBodyRender]`

## ConfirmationDialogComponent
- selector: `uni-confirmation-dialog, Confirmation`
- inputs:
  - `show: boolean` = false
  - `confirmation: Confirmation`
- outputs:
  - `showing: boolean`

## DragAndDropDirective
- selector: `[uni-drag-n-drop], [dragAndDrop]`
- outputs:
  - `onFileDropped: FileList`

## NotificationsComponent
- selector: `uni-notifications, Notifications`

## RippleDirective
- selector: `[uniRipple]`

## UniAlertComponent
- selector: `uni-alert, Alert`
- inputs:
  - `iconName: IconName | undefined` = undefined
  - `symbolName: string | undefined` = undefined
  - `useVariant: boolean` = false
- two-way models:
  - `show: boolean`
- outputs:
  - `showing: boolean`

## UniBackgroundComponent
- selector: `uni-background, Background`
- inputs:
  - `image: string`
  - `imagePosition: ImagePosition`
  - `imageSize: 'cover' | 'contain' | number | string`
  - `height: number | string` = '100%'
  - `width: number | string`

## UniBadgeComponent
- selector: `div[uni-badge], Badge`
- inputs:
  - `color: Variant | undefined` = undefined
  - `useVariant: boolean` = false
  - `width: number`

## UniBoxComponent
- selector: `div[uni-box-layout], Box, div[box-layout]`
- inputs:
  - `color: ContainerColorToken`
  - `backgroundColor: OptionalColor`
  - `borderRadius: OptionalRadius`
  - `borderRadiusLeft: OptionalRadius`
  - `borderRadiusRight: OptionalRadius`
  - `borderRadiusTop: OptionalRadius`
  - `borderRadiusBottom: OptionalRadius`
  - `padding: OptionalSize`
  - `paddingHorizontal: OptionalSize`
  - `paddingVertical: OptionalSize`
  - `paddingLeft: OptionalSize`
  - `paddingRight: OptionalSize`
  - `paddingTop: OptionalSize`
  - `paddingBottom: OptionalSize`
  - `border: OptionalBorder`
  - `borderTop: OptionalBorder`
  - `borderBottom: OptionalBorder`
  - `borderLeft: OptionalBorder`
  - `borderRight: OptionalBorder`
  - `dashBorder: boolean` = false
  - `alignSelf: OptionalAlignSelf`
  - `alignItems: OptionalAlignItems`
  - `alignContent: OptionalAlignContent`
  - `justifyContent: OptionalJustifyContent`
  - `grow: number`
  - `display: OptionalDisplay`
  - `position: OptionalPosition`
  - `inset: number | string`
  - `height: number | string`
  - `minHeight: number | string`
  - `maxHeight: number | string`
  - `width: number | string`
  - `minWidth: number | string`
  - `maxWidth: number | string`
  - `ignoreDir: boolean` = true
  - `gridArea: string`
  - `gridColumn: string`
  - `gridRow: string`
  - `overflow: OptionalOverflow`
  - `shadow: Shadow`
  - `gap: OptionalSize`
  - `fullWidth: boolean`
  - `fullHeight: boolean`
  - `flexDirection: OptionalFlexDirection`
  - `textAlign: OptionalTextAlign`
  - `wrapItems: OptionalWrap` = undefined
  - `zIndex: ZIndexableElements`

## UniButtonComponent
- selector: `button[uni-text-button], Button, button[text-button]`
- inputs:
  - `disable: boolean | undefined` = false
  - `loading: boolean | undefined` = false
  - `fullWidth: boolean` = false
  - `symbolLeft: string`
  - `symbolRight: string`

## UniButtonGroupComponent
- selector: `uni-button-group, ButtonGroup`

## UniCardComponent
- selector: `uni-card, Card`

## UniCardContentComponent
- selector: `uni-card-content, CardContent`

## UniCardHeaderComponent
- selector: `uni-card-header, CardHeader`
- inputs:
  - `title: string` = ''
  - `titleTextRole: Typeface` = 'title-large'

## UniCenterComponent
- selector: `div[uni-center-layout], div[center-layout]`
- inputs:
  - `display: OptionalDisplay` = 'flex'
  - `justifyContent: OptionalJustifyContent` = 'center'
  - `alignItems: OptionalAlignItems` = 'center'

## UniCheckboxComponent
- selector: `uni-checkbox, Checkbox`
- inputs:
  - `disabled: boolean` = false
  - `invalid: boolean` = false
  - `dirty: boolean` = false
  - `required: boolean` = false — Synced from required() validators by the Signal Forms [field] directive.
  - `ariaDescribedBy: string` — Id(s) of external element(s) describing this control — typically your app-rendered error message — exposed as aria-describedby.
  - `label: string`
- two-way models:
  - `checked: boolean` = false
  - `touched: boolean` = false
  - `indeterminate: boolean` = false — Mixed state for "select all"-style parent checkboxes. Cleared automatically on the next user interaction, matching native behavior.

## UniDataSearchComponent
- selector: `uni-data-search`
- inputs:
  - `datasource: UniDatasource<T>`
  - `placeholder: string` = 'Search'
  - `fields: string[]`

## UniDataTableComponent
- selector: `uni-data-table, DataTable`
- inputs:
  - `datasource: UniDatasource<T>` (required)
  - `columns: ColumnDefinition<T>[]` (required)
  - `useMultiSelect: boolean` = false
  - `useRowClick: boolean` = true
  - `height: string`
- outputs:
  - `rowSelect: T`
  - `rowClick: T`

## UniDebounceInputComponent
- selector: `DebounceInput, uni-debounce-input`
- inputs:
  - `inputName: string`
  - `inputId: string`
  - `debounceTime: number` = 400
- outputs:
  - `change: string`

## UniDialogButtonsComponent
- selector: `uni-dialog-buttons, DialogButtons, div[dialog-buttons]`
- inputs:
  - `confirmButtonText: string`
  - `confirmButtonVariant: Variant` = 'primary'
  - `cancelButtonText: string`
  - `disableConfirm: boolean`
  - `padding: NullableSize` = 'md'
  - `paddingBottom: NullableSize` = 'lg'
  - `justifyContent: JustifyContent` = 'center'
- outputs:
  - `confirmed: unknown`

## UniDialogComponent
- selector: `dialog[uni-dialog], Dialog`
- inputs:
  - `ariaLabel: string` — Accessible name for dialogs without a DialogHeader. When a DialogHeader is present it labels the dialog automatically via aria-labelledby.
  - `initialFocus: string` — CSS selector for the element to focus when the dialog opens. Defaults to the browser's native behavior (first focusable element).
  - `defaultCloseButton: boolean`
- two-way models:
  - `show: boolean` = false — Two-way bindable open state: [(show)].
- outputs:
  - `showing: boolean` — Emits true once opened and false once the closing animation finishes.

## UniDialogHeaderComponent
- selector: `div[uni-dialog-header], DialogHeader`

## UniDividerComponent
- selector: `uni-divider, Divider`
- inputs:
  - `orientation: Orientation` = 'horizontal'
  - `border: Border` = 'primary'

## UniDropdownComponent
- selector: `uni-dropdown, Dropdown`
- inputs:
  - `trigger: HTMLElement` (required)
  - `placement: Placement` = 'bottom-start'
  - `offset: OffsetOptions` = { mainAxis: 4, alignmentAxis: 12 }
  - `ariaHasPopup: AriaHasPopup | null` = null — Value for aria-haspopup on the trigger, describing what the popover contains (e.g. 'menu' for Menu, 'dialog' for rich content). When unset, only aria-expanded/aria-controls are managed.
  - `paddingVertical: NullableSize`
  - `paddingHorizontal: NullableSize`
- outputs:
  - `dropdownShowing: boolean`
  - `dropdownHiding: boolean`

## UniExpandAreaComponent
- selector: `uni-expand-area, ExpandArea`
- inputs:
  - `title: string` (required)
  - `initCollapsed: boolean` = false
  - `padding: NullableSize` = 'md'
- outputs:
  - `collapsed: boolean`

## UniExpandComponent
- selector: `uni-expand, Expand`
- two-way models:
  - `collapsed: boolean` = true

## UniExpandToggleComponent
- selector: `uni-expand-toggle, ExpandToggle`
- inputs:
  - `ariaControls: string` — Id of the Expand region this toggle controls (see UniExpandComponent.regionId).
- two-way models:
  - `collapsed: boolean` = true

## UniFileDropZoneComponent
- selector: `uni-file-drop-zone`
- inputs:
  - `height: number | string`
  - `borderRadius: Radius` = 'md'
  - `border: Variant` = 'light'
  - `padding: NullableSize` = 'lg'
  - `useBrowseButton: boolean` = false
  - `browseButtonText: string` = 'Browse for file'
  - `allowedFileExtensions: string[]` = []
  - `label: string`
  - `helpTemplate: TemplateRef<unknown> | null` = null
  - `helpTemplateContext: unknown | null` = null
- outputs:
  - `fileAttached: File | undefined`
  - `fileRemoved: unknown`

## UniGridAreaComponent
- selector: `GridArea`
- inputs:
  - `area: string` (required)

## UniGridComponent
- selector: `div[uni-grid-layout], Grid, div[grid-layout]`
- inputs:
  - `display: OptionalDisplay` = 'grid'
  - `templateAreas: string`
  - `templateColumns: string`
  - `templateRows: string`
  - `outline: Thickness`
  - `outlineColor: Variant`

## UniIconButtonComponent
- selector: `button[uni-icon-button], button[icon-button]`
- inputs:
  - `ariaLabel: string` — Accessible name for the button. Alternative to projecting text content (`<button icon-button>Close</button>`); one of the two is required for an icon-only button to be announced correctly.
  - `iconName: IconName`
  - `symbolName: string`
  - `variant: Variant` = 'ghost'
  - `size: Size` = 'lg'
  - `disable: boolean`
  - `loading: boolean`
  - `opticalSize: number` = 24

## UniIconComponent
- selector: `uni-icon, Icon`
- inputs:
  - `color: ColorToken`
  - `name: keyof Icons` (required)

## UniInputBoxComponent
- selector: `uni-input-box`
- inputs:
  - `disabled: boolean` = false
  - `error: boolean` = false
  - `minWidth: string` = '0'

## UniInputComponent
- selector: `uni-input`
- inputs:
  - `disabled: boolean` = false
  - `invalid: boolean` = false
  - `dirty: boolean` = false
  - `required: boolean` = false — Synced from required() validators by the Signal Forms [field] directive.
  - `ariaDescribedBy: string` — Id(s) of external element(s) describing this control — typically your app-rendered error message — exposed as aria-describedby.
  - `label: string` (required)
  - `placeholder: string` = ''
- two-way models:
  - `value: string` = ''
  - `touched: boolean` = false

## UniJsonViewComponent
- selector: `uni-json-view`
- inputs:
  - `json: unknown`
  - `rows: number` = 6
  - `fontSize: AbsoluteSize | string` = 'medium'
  - `width: string | number` = '100%'
  - `selectOnClick: boolean` = true

## UniMenuComponent
- selector: `Menu, uni-menu`
- inputs:
  - `menuItems: MenuItem[]` (required)
  - `activeItem: MenuItem`
  - `placement: Placement` = 'bottom-start'
- outputs:
  - `menuItemClicked: MenuItem`

## UniMenuItemComponent
- selector: `div[uni-menu-item], div[menu-item]`
- inputs:
  - `display: OptionalDisplay` = 'flex'
  - `flexDirection: OptionalFlexDirection` = 'row'
  - `alignItems: OptionalAlignItems` = 'center'
  - `paddingHorizontal: OptionalSize` = 'md'
  - `gap: OptionalSize` = 'md'
  - `label: string`
  - `template: TemplateRef<T>`
  - `context: T`
  - `symbolName: string`
  - `active: boolean`
  - `hoverColor: ContainerColorToken` = 'primary-container'
  - `disabled: boolean` = false

## UniMultiSelectComponent
- selector: `uni-multi-select, MultiSelect`
- inputs:
  - `options: Option<T>[]` = []
  - `selections: T[] | null | undefined` = undefined
  - `flexDirection: 'row' | 'row-reverse' | 'column' | 'column-reverse'` = 'column'
  - `checkboxGap: NullableSize | undefined` = 'sm'
- outputs:
  - `updates: T[] | undefined`

## UniMultiSelectDropdownComponent
- selector: `uni-multi-select-dropdown, MultiSelectDropdown`
- inputs:
  - `disabled: boolean` = false
  - `invalid: boolean` = false
  - `dirty: boolean` = false
  - `required: boolean` = false — Synced from required() validators by the Signal Forms [field] directive.
  - `ariaDescribedBy: string` — Id(s) of external element(s) describing this control — typically your app-rendered error message — exposed as aria-describedby.
  - `options: Options<T>` (required)
  - `placeholder: string` = ''
- two-way models:
  - `value: T[]` = []
  - `touched: boolean` = false

## UniNotificationBadgeComponent
- selector: `uni-notification-badge`
- inputs:
  - `count: number | undefined` = undefined
  - `maxCount: number` = 99
  - `badgeVariant: 'dot' | 'count' | 'pill'` = 'count'
  - `color: Variant | undefined` = undefined
  - `position: 'top-right' | 'top-left' | 'bottom-right' | 'bottom-left'` = 'top-right'
  - `show: boolean` = true
  - `ariaLabel: string` — Screen-reader text for the badge (e.g. "5 unread messages"). Without it a sensible default is announced; a bare number or dot carries no meaning.

## UniPaginatorComponent
- selector: `uni-paginator, Paginator`
- inputs:
  - `datasource: UniDatasource<T>`
  - `initPageSize: number`
  - `showPageSize: boolean` = true
  - `showPageJumper: boolean` = true
  - `showPageNumbers: boolean` = true

## UniPopoverComponent
- selector: `uni-popover, Popover`
- inputs:
  - `placement: Placement`
  - `autoClose: boolean` = true

## UniProgressBarComponent
- selector: `uni-progress-bar, ProgressBar`
- inputs:
  - `width: number` = 560
  - `height: number` = 24
  - `percent: number` = 0
  - `ariaLabel: string` — Accessible name describing what is progressing (e.g. "Upload progress").

## UniProgressGaugeComponent
- selector: `uni-progress-gauge, ProgressGauge`
- inputs:
  - `percent: number` = 0
  - `ariaLabel: string` — Accessible name describing what is progressing.

## UniRadioComponent
- selector: `uni-radio, Radio`
- inputs:
  - `disabled: boolean` = false
  - `invalid: boolean` = false
  - `dirty: boolean` = false
  - `required: boolean` = false — Synced from required() validators by the Signal Forms [field] directive.
  - `ariaDescribedBy: string` — Id(s) of external element(s) describing this control — typically your app-rendered error message — exposed as aria-describedby.
  - `options: UniRadioOption[]` = []
  - `label: string`
  - `name: string` = uniqueId('uni-radio-group')
- two-way models:
  - `value: string` = ''
  - `touched: boolean` = false

## UniRowComponent
- selector: `div[uni-row-layout], Row, div[row-layout]`
- inputs:
  - `display: OptionalDisplay` = 'flex'
  - `flexDirection: OptionalFlexDirection` = 'row'
  - `minWidth: number | string | undefined` = 'fit-content'

## UniScrollAreaComponent
- selector: `div[uni-scroll-area], ScrollArea, div[scroll-area]`
- inputs:
  - `color: ContainerColorToken`
  - `borderRadius: Radius` = 'sm'
  - `padding: OptionalSize`
  - `paddingHorizontal: OptionalSize`
  - `paddingVertical: OptionalSize`
  - `paddingLeft: OptionalSize`
  - `paddingRight: OptionalSize`
  - `paddingTop: OptionalSize`
  - `paddingBottom: OptionalSize`
  - `border: Variant`
  - `height: OptionalValue`
  - `width: OptionalValue`
  - `appearance: ScrollbarAppearance` = 'compact'
  - `autoHeightDisabled: boolean` = false
  - `verticalScrollPadding: number` = 29
- outputs:
  - `scrollable: boolean`

## UniSearchInputComponent
- selector: `SearchInput, uni-search-input`
- inputs:
  - `label: string` (required)
  - `width: string | number` = '100%'
- outputs:
  - `change: string`
  - `search: string`

## UniSelectComponent
- selector: `uni-select, SelectInput`
- inputs:
  - `disabled: boolean` = false
  - `invalid: boolean` = false
  - `dirty: boolean` = false
  - `required: boolean` = false — Synced from required() validators by the Signal Forms [field] directive.
  - `ariaDescribedBy: string` — Id(s) of external element(s) describing this control — typically your app-rendered error message — exposed as aria-describedby.
  - `options: Options<T>` = []
  - `placeholder: string`
  - `ariaLabel: string` — Accessible name for the select; a placeholder is not a label.
- two-way models:
  - `value: T | null` = null
  - `touched: boolean` = false

## UniSnackbarComponent
- selector: `uni-snackbar, Snackbar`
- inputs:
  - `iconName: IconName`
  - `symbolName: string`
  - `timeout: number | string | 'disabled'`
  - `actionLabel: string`
  - `useVariant: boolean` = false
- two-way models:
  - `show: boolean` — Two-way bindable open state: [(show)].
- outputs:
  - `action: unknown`
  - `showing: boolean`

## UniSortHeaderComponent
- selector: `uni-sort-header`
- inputs:
  - `column: keyof T`
  - `datasource: UniDatasource<T>`

## UniStackComponent
- selector: `div[uni-stack-layout], Stack, div[stack-layout]`
- inputs:
  - `display: OptionalDisplay` = 'flex'
  - `flexDirection: OptionalFlexDirection` = 'column'
  - `minHeight: number | string | undefined` = 'fit-content'

## UniSymbolComponent
- selector: `uni-symbol, Symbol`
- inputs:
  - `name: string` (required)
  - `fill: SymbolFill`
  - `weight: SymbolWeight`
  - `grade: SymbolGrade`
  - `opticalSize: number`

## UniTagComponent
- selector: `Tag, uni-tag`
- inputs:
  - `label: string`
  - `value: string | number`
- outputs:
  - `close: string | number`

## UniTextComponent
- selector: `uni-text, Text`
- inputs:
  - `typeface: Typeface` = 'title-small'
  - `color: ColorKey`
  - `display: OptionalDisplay`
  - `align: OptionalTextAlign`
  - `nowrap: boolean`
  - `maxWidth: number`
  - `ellipsis: boolean` = false

## UniToggleComponent
- selector: `uni-toggle, Toggle`
- inputs:
  - `disabled: boolean` = false
  - `invalid: boolean` = false
  - `dirty: boolean` = false
  - `required: boolean` = false — Synced from required() validators by the Signal Forms [field] directive.
  - `ariaDescribedBy: string` — Id(s) of external element(s) describing this control — typically your app-rendered error message — exposed as aria-describedby.
  - `label: string`
- two-way models:
  - `checked: boolean` = false
  - `touched: boolean` = false

## UniTooltipComponent
- selector: `uni-tooltip, Tooltip`
- inputs:
  - `hoverDelay: number` = 500
  - `label: string` (required)
  - `placement: Placement` = 'top'
  - `inlineText: boolean` = false
  - `appendToBody: boolean` = false

## UniWrapComponent
- selector: `div[uni-wrap-layout], Wrap, div[wrap-layout]`
- inputs:
  - `display: OptionalDisplay` = 'flex'
  - `wrapItems: OptionalWrap` = 'wrap'
